title: Egyptian Chicken Wrap
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make wrap filled with chicken, citrusy flavors, and fluffy goodness. Serve with a side of fresh vegetables for a complete meal.

ingredients.name: fluffy flatbread
ingredients.notes: or substitute with a similar wrap

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the chicken breast with egyptian spices and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the flatbread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for 2-3 minutes.
Spread the citrusy tahini sauce on the toasted flatbread.
Slice the cooked chicken breast and place it on top of the sauce.
Sprinkle chopped parsley and cilantro on top of the chicken.
Drizzle with lemon juice and olive oil.
Fold the flatbread in half to enclose the filling.
